title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's victory impacts their tournament standing and chances for a higher seed in the NCAA tournament.

title: Virginia Secures Win Against NC State, 81-74
summary: Virginia defeated N.C. State for the third time this season, with Malik Thomas and Thijs De Ridder leading the scoring.
charlotte_impact: This win contributes to Virginia's overall record and performance in the ACC Tournament.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament
summary: Virginia plays NC State in a quarterfinal round matchup at the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Preview
summary: Preview of the NC State Wolfpack vs. No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers ACC Tournament quarterfinal game in Charlotte, North Carolina.

title: Charlotte Weather Forecast: Spring Begins with Warmth
summary: Charlotte is experiencing perfect spring weather, with temperatures steadily rising throughout the weekend, feeling like April, May, and June.
charlotte_impact: Good weather impacts outdoor activities and overall mood in the Charlotte area.

title: Former USPS Employee Sentenced for Mail Theft and Fraud
summary: Andre Whitehurst sentenced to 15 months for bank fraud scheme involving stolen mail, resulting in attempted losses of $364,000.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the consequences of mail theft and fraud, impacting financial security.

title: Uptown Stabbing Leaves One Seriously Injured
summary: A 23-year-old is hospitalized after a stabbing in Uptown early Friday, with the assault occurring on W 6th Street.

title: Shooting Near Charlotte Walmart Injures One

summary: John Walter Breedlove is charged with kidnapping, taking indecent liberties with a child, and first-degree forcible sex offense.

title: Winthrop University Upperclassmen Face Housing Shortage

title: Teacher Retention Challenges in Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools
